raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "expressing a conditional personal commitment to reparative action guided by harm-reduction ethics",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "past harms to identifiable others have occurred",
    "direct amends are generally feasible and preferable",
    "the speaker possesses sufficient judgment to assess injury risk",
    "a duty exists to make amends unless overridden by potential harm"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; the exception clause logically qualifies the commitment without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker has accurately identified harmed parties, possesses realistic capacity for amends, and applies consistent, non-self-serving judgment about injury",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "speaker uses the injury exception to avoid accountability, misjudges or exaggerates risks, or invokes the principle without genuine intent to act"
}
